nasb.text: When He keeps quiet, who then can condemn? And when He hides His face, who then can behold Him, That is, in regard to both nation and man?—

esv.text: When he is quiet, who can condemn? When he hides his face, who can behold him, whether it be a nation or a man?—

cnv.text: 他若安靜不動，誰能定他有罪呢？ 他若掩面，誰能看見他呢？ 無論對待一國或一人，都是這樣。

ccb.text: 但祂若保持缄默，谁能定祂有罪？ 祂若掩起脸来，谁能看得见祂？ 个人和国家都靠祂垂顾，
